title: Character Count
description: Count the number of characters in the text units of a set of documents or/and in its parts. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

countInTextUnits.description: Create character count annotations for text unit resources.

countInBatch.description: Add character count annotation aggregated per batch

countInGroups.title: Groups

bufferSize.title: Size of text buffer:
bufferSize.description: Size of the internal text buffer used during counting (0 for default)

simplifierRules.description: Code simplifier rules for simplifying inline codes before counting.
